response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript and cloud technologies, and recent work on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) is highly relevant. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of building production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent systems required for this role. His background is more generalist than specialized in GenAI/cloud infrastructure delivery.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure via AWS CDK)
Recent leadership in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows)
Strong full-stack engineering background with production-grade system design
concerns: No clear evidence of building production-grade AI solutions or AI-driven systems
Lacks demonstrated expertise with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks
Background leans more toward general software engineering than specialized GenAI/cloud delivery
